name: Richard Hatch
signature_move: Stepped down from the Final Immunity Challenge at Final 3, correctly calculating that Kelly would take him over Rudy to the Final 2 — a move that both secured his spot and damaged Kelly's jury standing.
strategy_summary: Richard Hatch invented the Survivor alliance, forming the Tagi Four (with Sue, Rudy, and Kelly) and executing the first systematic post-merge elimination of an opposing tribe — a strategy so dominant it became known as 'Pagonging.' His game was built on strategic foresight and vote control rather than physical dominance, culminating in his legendary Final Immunity step-down that manipulated the endgame to his advantage. He won despite being openly disliked by several jurors, proving that respect for gameplay could overcome personal animosity.
fun_fact: Richard was the first person in Survivor history to form a voting alliance — a concept so foreign to the other players that Pagong tribe members openly refused to 'play politics' and were systematically eliminated as a result.
